{{Infobox character
| name = Kthanikahr
| aliases = Kethanikahr
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Worm Lord, grave-bug, Great Elder
| affiliations = Sleepless
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Kthanikahr Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kthanikahr, also known as the [[Worm Lord]], is one of the [[Great Elders]]. He is a monstrous entity associated with decay and the impermanence of flesh, possessing a body that can be seen as a massive worm stretching for miles through a mountain. His primary interest is the preservation of the planet to serve as a habitat for his worms, and he seeks to replace humanity with them. Legend suggests that the weather was blighted by a [[Great Elder]] when [[the Emperor]] struck Kthanikahr down. His forces consist of various worm-like creatures and [[Elderspawn]] that move in massive, squirming hordes. His tomb is located in northern [[Izyria]], though his influence and the activity of his spawn are noted in other regions. In historical myth, a legendary [[Soulbound]] warrior once fought him directly, an encounter that resulted in the creation of the [[Dylian Basin]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Wormclouds are said to stem from [[Kthanikahr]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Kthanikahr]] is interested in preserving the planet as a habitat for his worms.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Kthanikahr]] contains tombs.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kthanikahr]] is a possible deity or symbol worshipped by the [[Sleepless]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kthanikahr]] wants humanity to be replaced by worms.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kthanikahr]] contains forges where the totem-man once worked.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The worms of [[Kthanikahr]] are a potential [[fate]] for those demoted from [[Sleepless]] leadership.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kthanikahr]] is the [[Worm Lord]] and a monster that can be seen as a miles-long worm burrowed around a towering mountain.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Myth states that [[Kthanikahr]] digests his victims alive over a thousand years.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Kthanikahr]] is the [[Worm Lord]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Kthanikahr]]'s hordes are said to prefer slithering in from the east.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Kthanikahr]] has worms.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Kthanikahr is an unknown entity characterized by worms emerging from his skin. These creatures are actually his own spawn, which possess the ability to bind a person as if they were hundreds of ropes. Due to these unsettling traits, he is referred to as a grave-bug.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kthanikahr]] is a man with worms coming out of his skin.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kthanikahr]] is an unknown entity.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kthanikahr]] is referred to as a grave-bug.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The worms were the spawn of [[Kthanikahr]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kthanikahr]] has spawn that can tie a person like hundreds of ropes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kthanikahr]] is a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr Six]] fought [[Kthanikahr]] head-on.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kthanikahr]] could be devouring towns in [[Dylia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
